must_not_assert: the logon script executed or the persistence fired (no post-write userinit.exe/art.bat ProcessCreate is present in the retained Sysmon window)
that no logon occurred (the scoped Sysmon source does not provide Security logon events)
active or effective persistence beyond the observed configuration state

the_trap: A UserInitMprLogonScript value is set to art.bat, creating an alarming autostart setup. No Sysmon-observable userinit.exe/art.bat execution appears after the write in the retained window; the model must not infer that the script ran or claim that a logon definitely did not occur.
rationale: A0 confirms the UserInitMprLogonScript registry value set and EV-001 records the reg.exe command that requested it. No post-write Sysmon ProcessCreate for userinit.exe launching art.bat, or for art.bat itself, is present in the retained window. The setup is visible, while its sensor-observable firing confirmation is not evidenced: suspicious missing evidence, not confirmed active persistence.
